titleStmt.title: SII 28.193: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 193. (A.R. No. 348 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, south gōpuram, right of entrance.

p.hi: Śrī Raṅga-dēva-mahārāya III Śaka 1503, Vṛisha, Kuṁbha śu. 14, Thursday, Śravishṭā. Irregular.

summary.p: Records that Vaiyyappa Kṛishṇappa Koṇḍama-nāyakkar gifted for his own merit, five villages, two in Gaṅgaikoṇḍāṉ-paṟṟu in Bhuvanēkavīraṉ-paṭṭaṇachchīrmai, one in Arasūr-paṟṟu-kīḻpaṟṟu, one in Teṉkarai-kōḻiyūr-paṟṟu and one in Kāvaṉūrpaṟṟu for the food offerings and festivals for God Chidambarēśvaraṉ of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr, a taṉiyūr in Vaḻudalapaṭṭu-uśāvaḍi in Veṇṇaiyūr-nāḍu in Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu and Goddess Śivakāmasundari and one village in Aḻiśūrkāṭṭil-paṟṟu for the sacred bath with thousand conch-shells to a deity in the thousand pillared-maṇḍapa, on the main day during the big festival in the month of Pūraṭṭādi (the total comes to six villages. Apparently he had missed the recording of the gift of one village). The levy on the sale of pepper (miḷagutaragu) in Chidambaram also was also included in the gift. All the villages were in the donor's kaṭṭaḷai (See No. 194 and 204 below)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ śubhamastu . svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran harihararāya vibhāṭan bhā
ṣaikkuttappum rāyara kaṇṭaṉ mūvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭaṉāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa
ṉāṭu koṭātāṉ pūrvva dakṣiṇa paścimottara catussamudrādhipati gajave
ṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya śrīvira pritāpaṉ śrīraṅgadeva mahārāyar prathivirājyam
paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa śakābdam 1000 5 100 3 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa vṛṣasamva
tsarattu kumbha nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu caturddamiyum guruvāsaramum peṟṟa
śrīviṣṭhānakṣatrattuṉāḷ vaṭakarai rājādhirāja vaḷaṉāṭu veṇṇaiyūr ṉā
ṭu vaḻutalampaṭṭu Ucāvaṭi taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr svāmi cidambareśvaranukku
Ammai civakāma cuntari Ammaikku kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa vaiyyappa kṛṣṇappa koṇṭamaṉāyakkar
kaṭṭaḷaikku vaiyyappa kṛṣṇappakkoṇṭamaṉāyakkarayyaṉ Avarkaḷ kuṭutta taṉma
cātanap paṭṭaiyam nammuṭaiya kaṭṭaḷai naivettiyam tiruviḻāvukkāka puvaṉekaviraṉ paṭṭa
ṇañcirmai keṅkai koṇṭāṉ paṟṟil kumutāmulaiyātaṉapaṭṭu ṉāṉkellai
kkuḷpaṭṭa grāmam Um Aracūr paṟṟu kiḻpaṟṟu kurukuparam nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa
grāmam 1 m teṉkarai koḻiyūr paṟṟuk koṉūr ṉāṉkellaikkuḷ paṭṭa
grāmam 1 m kāvaṉūr paṟṟil toḻuvūr ṉāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa grāmam 1 Āka
Āka grāmam 5 m cidambara miḷaku tarakum yitu nammuṭaiya Upayamāka kaṭṭaḷai
yiṭṭa puraṭṭātit tiruviḻāvukku periya tiruṉāḷ Āyirakkāl maṇṭapattil gaṇḍa
vasanthanukkuSee No. 204 below-11 16-17. There also this word gaṇḍavasanthukku occurs. The meaning of the word is however, not clear. sahasraśaṅkhābhiṣekattukkumāka Aḻicukāṭṭil paṟṟu
keṅkai koṇṭāṉ nāṉkellaiḷpaṭṭa grāmam 1m Āka grāmam Eḻum
miḷaku tarakum vaiyyappa kṛṣṇappakkoṇṭamaṉāyakkarayyaṉ Avarkaḷukku
puṇyamāka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭiyāle Inta grāmam Eḻumcf. 204 below. Here the scribe has missed writing eṟumpūrpaṟṟu nalveli nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa grāmam oṉṟummiḷaku tarakum cantirātit
yavaraiyum nammuṭaya kaṭṭaḷaiyile Aṉupavittuk koḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷākavum
§
Digital edition of SII 28.193 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
